error_signature: useAuth must be used within AuthProvider
raw_error_excerpt: Error: useAuth must be used within an AuthProvider.
root_cause: Component uses useAuth hook but omitted AuthProvider
fix_actions: add AuthProvider import
wrap with AuthProvider
generalizable_rule: If a hook requires a provider, include that provider in the wrapper plan.

error_signature: useTheme must be used within ThemeProvider
raw_error_excerpt: Error: useTheme must be used within ThemeProvider.
root_cause: ThemeProvider nested inside dependent provider
fix_actions: reorder provider nesting
generalizable_rule: Providers must be nested according to their dependency graph.

error_signature: Cannot find module chartHelpers
raw_error_excerpt: Cannot find module chartHelpers
root_cause: Import path uses alias that does not resolve
fix_actions: replace alias with relative path
generalizable_rule: Every import path must be verified to resolve before emission.

error_signature: UserProfile is not exported
raw_error_excerpt: Module does not provide export named UserProfile.
root_cause: Named import but component uses default export
fix_actions: change named to default import
generalizable_rule: Import symbols must match actual exports of the target module.

error_signature: Cannot find module paymentApi
raw_error_excerpt: Cannot find module paymentApi.
root_cause: jest.mock() uses alias path that does not resolve
fix_actions: replace alias with relative path in jest.mock()
generalizable_rule: jest.mock() module paths must resolve to existing modules.

error_signature: Cannot access mockUseAuth before initialization
raw_error_excerpt: ReferenceError: Cannot access mockUseAuth before initialization.
root_cause: jest.mock() factory references const in TDZ
fix_actions: use arrow wrapper in mock factory
generalizable_rule: Mock factories must not reference variables outside their scope.

error_signature: toBeInTheDocument is not a function
raw_error_excerpt: TypeError: expect(...).toBeInTheDocument is not a function.
root_cause: jest-dom setup import missing
fix_actions: add jest-dom import
generalizable_rule: Always include jest-dom setup import when generating DOM matchers.

error_signature: Unable to find element with text Loading
raw_error_excerpt: Unable to find element with text: Loading.
root_cause: Async content queried with getBy instead of findBy
fix_actions: replace getByText with findByText
add await
generalizable_rule: Use findBy/waitFor for async content, not getBy.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined reading map
raw_error_excerpt: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map).
root_cause: Mock return value missing nested property
fix_actions: add expenses: [] to mock return value
generalizable_rule: Mock return values must include all properties the component accesses.

error_signature: Retry loop stopped with 2 failures remaining
raw_error_excerpt: Healing loop terminated after 1 retry with 2/5 tests still failing.
root_cause: Loop exited prematurely
fix_actions: ensure loop continues while failures > 0
generalizable_rule: The healing loop must continue while failures remain.
